Everyone views Marco as their biggest threat and they are going to do EVERYTHING to take him down.

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Did you watch?
body:
CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT

If you watched last night's Republican debate -- and I really
hope you did -- you saw me fight for our shared conservative
values. I represented US -- you and me -- and I was pretty much
alone in that fight.

Dear Friend,

If you watched last night's Republican debate -- and I really
hope you did -- you saw me fight for our shared conservative
values.

I represented US -- you and me -- and I was pretty much alone in
that fight.

That's why I need you to have my back as I take on the Washington
Cartel's FAVORITE candidates -- ANYONE BUT ME!
You see: I stood up against the failed and losing strategies of
the GOP establishment, laid out clear solutions to issues facing
America, and shared the path to ultimately defeat Hillary
Clinton.

Here are the broad strokes:

I demonstrated how America needs a Commander-in-Chief with a
conservative vision who will lead our nation in the opposite
direction of Barack Obama and his failed policies.
I am the one candidate who will stand up to the Washington Cartel
and the D.C. establishment. I will defend the Constitution and
stand up for the American people.
I spoke about how we will keep America safe from the increasing
threat of North Korea, Iran, and ISIS.
I laid out my detailed plan on how we deal with illegal
immigration, enforce the law, and secure our borders.

But what you also saw was some of my opponents arguing for the
failed policies and strategies of the GOP establishment, policies
that have lost election after election and even guaranteed the
election of Barack Obama.

Friend, to defeat Hillary Clinton and Bernie Sanders -- we
cannot replay the failed strategies of the GOP establishment and
the Washington Cartel. That's why I need you on my team.
Any candidate on the stage last night would make a better
Commander-in-Chief than Hillary Clinton or Bernie Sanders.

But I'm the ONLY candidate who will unite Republicans around our
shared conservative values, defeat Hillary Clinton, and reverse
the Obama agenda for America.

In just 48 hours, New Hampshire will cast the first primary votes
in our nominating process.

Friend, my campaign is about something different. I represent
us.

But to stay in as funds become even more important and scarce --
I need YOU.

So now, I'm calling in all the favors I have left. That is how
important this is...

Will you please make an online contribution to my campaign and
stand with me in my bid to represent our nation?

Friend, this is our time, and I'm truly counting on you.

For liberty,

Ted Cruz

P.S. I thank you from the bottom of my heart for all the support
and encouragement you've given me. And I'm terribly sorry to have
to ask, but can I please count on you for a donation of $5, $35,
or another amount?

PAID FOR BY CRUZ
FOR PRESIDENTwww.tedcruz.org

Copyright © 2016 All Rights Reserved | Privacy Policy

name: Mike DuHaime
subject: A momentum changing touchdown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
**"Christie Delivered One Of The Strongest Performances Of The Campaign"**
-_Washington Post's_ Dan Balz
We couldn't have said it better. The response from New Hampshire voters, TV pundits and even our critics has been overwhelmingly positive. They are saying what we've known all along: Chris Christie is an experienced, executive leader who will tell it like it is and is the best candidate to take on Hillary or Bernie.
With the most important moment in this campaign approaching on Tuesday, now, more than ever, **[we need to keep up the momentum.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46114776:6QaxQHrCN:m:1:1516426255:E544B89799EFCBE90E89193D944AADD1:r)
**[So today, I am asking you, will you please show him that you support him with a donation of $10 or more?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46114776:6QaxQHrCN:m:1:1516426255:E544B89799EFCBE90E89193D944AADD1:r)
Let's keep the momentum up and do this! **[Chip in today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46114776:6QaxQHrCN:m:1:1516426255:E544B89799EFCBE90E89193D944AADD1:r)
Thank you,
Mike DuHaime
Chief Strategist
Chris Christie for President

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46114777:6QaxQHrCN:m:1:1516426255:E544B89799EFCBE90E89193D944AADD1:r)

name: President George H.W. Bush
subject: I am confident
body:
Dear Friend,

2\. There are just 2 days left until New Hampshire votes.

It does not seem possible, but it has been 28 years since our team came off a tough showing in Iowa and came back to win New Hampshire. The momentum it gave our team allowed us to break free to daylight, and go on to capture the nomination -- and the presidency.

So I know how important New Hampshire is. And from Barbara's visit there with Jeb, I know you do too. **But, I also know Jeb 's team needs to raise $100,000 before Tuesday to have the resources they need.**

[**I 'm hoping I can count on you to help him hit that goal with a gift of $1 right now.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/hhfrjsfpmwczndnvzsgrmzldffzlpdjprshscpdscqfq_hwhccmfn.html)

These resources are critical to turn out voters to the polls and make all the contacts they need to over the next 2 days.

This race is just getting started, and I know Jeb is best prepared to be Commander-in-Chief on Day One. As more and more voters make their final decisions, I am confident Jeb can and will win.

[**But first, he needs your help to hit his goal of raising $100,000 before New Hampshire votes on Tuesday. Please, rush a gift of just $1 to help Jeb.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/wnzqkwjmzsgbfhfdbwyqzbthjjbtmhkmqwnwgmhwgljv_hwhccmfn.html)

Barbara and I appreciate everything you've done for Jeb so far, and we hope he will earn your support Tuesday: [**Jeb2016.com/Stand-with-Jeb/**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/tmmfsbprjcvkwtwlkbgfjkdtppkdrtsrfbmbvrtbvzpb_hwhccmfn.html)

Sincerely,

President George H.W. Bush

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/zwljvbfqdlskzczrkbtjdkgcffkgqcvqjbwbsqcbsmfs_hwhccmfn.html)
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=8470&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18)

name: Jeff Roe, Cruz for President
subject: Here's to many more!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT [www
body:
Courageous Conservatives \- Reigniting the Promise of America
**Hello Friend,**
On Monday of this week, the first poll that mattered of the 2016 cycle was held -- the Iowa Caucus. A record number of Iowans showed up to make their voices heard, and that they did! **Ted received more votes on Monday than any other Republican candidate in caucus history!** If you haven't yet, you'll want to [hear what he said at the victory speech](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33392346:snxu7TCDN:m:1:1104269936:5D975F96EFA29B2842322A8B9FD87F99:r).
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33392346:snxu7TCDN:m:1:1104269936:5D975F96EFA29B2842322A8B9FD87F99:r)
In addition to a victory for Ted, Monday night was a victory for the grassroots, for the millions of conservatives across the country who are rising up to take our country back. It was a victory for working men and women who have shouldered the brunt of the over eight years of out-of-control spending by the Washington establishment. It was a victory for every American who believes a new day is coming for this nation. And even more than everything else, it was victory for YOU. It's because of you we did what almost everyone said was impossible. We took on the past two caucus winners, the media, the Washington Establishment, the powerful ethanol lobby, the sitting governor, and more -- and we won!
Not taking a moment to rest, Ted immediately flew to New Hampshire and South Carolina where we saw an outpouring of enthusiasm for our campaign from people of all walks of life. In Greenville, SC, the night after the caucus, Ted was greeted by over 1,000 supporters! And you didn't stop there. In just the three days following the caucus, [our campaign raised over $3 million from over 182,000 contributions averaging $55.00, for a total of $10 million raised since January first](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33392347:snxu7TCDN:m:1:1104269936:5D975F96EFA29B2842322A8B9FD87F99:r)!
Following Iowa, we have a model that we know works, and we're going to take it across the country. As we did in Iowa, we have opened a Camp Cruz in both [New Hampshire](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33392348:snxu7TCDN:m:1:1104269936:5D975F96EFA29B2842322A8B9FD87F99:r) and [South Carolina](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33392349:snxu7TCDN:m:1:1104269936:5D975F96EFA29B2842322A8B9FD87F99:r) and courageous conservatives from all across the country are sacrificing their time and talent to help Ted #CruzToVictory! If you haven't joined the over 200,000 Americans who have signed up as a volunteer, don't wait -- we need your help! **[Sign up today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33392350:snxu7TCDN:m:1:1104269936:5D975F96EFA29B2842322A8B9FD87F99:r)**.
At last night's ABC News Republican Debate, Ted made his closing argument to New Hampshirites before they head to the polls on Tuesday. He made clear his commitment to turning this country around by getting back to the Constitution and the principles that made our country great. He also pledged to always stand with the American people against the bipartisan corruption of Washington -- something he has a proven record of doing his entire life. **[You can watch that and more here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33392351:snxu7TCDN:m:1:1104269936:5D975F96EFA29B2842322A8B9FD87F99:r)**.
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33392351:snxu7TCDN:m:1:1104269936:5D975F96EFA29B2842322A8B9FD87F99:r)
We shocked the nation on Monday, and that won't be the last time we do so. Whether you're in [New Hampshire](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33392352:snxu7TCDN:m:1:1104269936:5D975F96EFA29B2842322A8B9FD87F99:r), [South Carolina](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33392353:snxu7TCDN:m:1:1104269936:5D975F96EFA29B2842322A8B9FD87F99:r), or [anywhere else](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33392354:snxu7TCDN:m:1:1104269936:5D975F96EFA29B2842322A8B9FD87F99:r), get ready to [#ChooseCruz at the ballot box](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33392354:snxu7TCDN:m:1:1104269936:5D975F96EFA29B2842322A8B9FD87F99:r)! With your help and the help of millions of Americans rising up across the nation, we will elect Ted as our next president!
To victory,
**Jeff Roe**
**Campaign Manager**
**Cruz for President**

[Eagle-Tribune](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33392355:snxu7TCDN:m:1:1104269936:5D975F96EFA29B2842322A8B9FD87F99:r)

[The Blaze](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33392357:snxu7TCDN:m:1:1104269936:5D975F96EFA29B2842322A8B9FD87F99:r)

BOOM! Ted Cruz releases NEW AD showing Jimmy Carter choosing TRUMP!
[Right Scoop](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33392359:snxu7TCDN:m:1:1104269936:5D975F96EFA29B2842322A8B9FD87F99:r)

[Conservative Review](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33392361:snxu7TCDN:m:1:1104269936:5D975F96EFA29B2842322A8B9FD87F99:r)

Ted Cruz doubles endorsements from Tennessee lawmakers
[The Tennessean](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33392363:snxu7TCDN:m:1:1104269936:5D975F96EFA29B2842322A8B9FD87F99:r)
Cruz Smashes the Ethanol Subsidy
[MSNBC](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33392364:snxu7TCDN:m:1:1104269936:5D975F96EFA29B2842322A8B9FD87F99:r)
How Cruz beat Trump
[Politico](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33392365:snxu7TCDN:m:1:1104269936:5D975F96EFA29B2842322A8B9FD87F99:r)
Ted Cruz Wins Voters One-on-One
[The Resurgent](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33392366:snxu7TCDN:m:1:1104269936:5D975F96EFA29B2842322A8B9FD87F99:r)
Cruz beats Trump in Iowa
[NBC News](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33392367:snxu7TCDN:m:1:1104269936:5D975F96EFA29B2842322A8B9FD87F99:r)

As we did in Iowa, we have opened a Camp Cruz in both and and courageous conservatives from all across the country are sacrificing their time and talent to help Ted #CruzToVictory! If you haven't joined the over 200,000 Americans who have signed up as a volunteer, don't wait -- we need your help! . At last night's ABC News Republican Debate, Ted made his closing argument to New Hampshirites before they head to the polls on Tuesday. He made clear his commitment to turning this country around by getting back to the Constitution and the principles that made our country great. He also pledged to always stand with the American people against the bipartisan corruption of Washington -- something he has a proven record of doing his entire life. . We shocked the nation on Monday, and that won't be the last time we do so. Whether you're in , , or , get ready to ! With your help and the help of millions of Americans rising up across the nation, we will elect Ted as our next president! To victory, Jeff Roe Campaign Manager Cruz for President Press Clips Huge crowd braves storm for Cruz NH Poll: Donald Trump Flat, Marco Rubio and Ted Cruz gaining Ted Cruz has Raised $3 Million Since Iowa Caucus Newsboys Lead Singer Michael Tait Endorses Ted Cruz Forces Align to Assault the First Hispanic-American to Win a Presidential Primary BOOM! Ted Cruz releases NEW AD showing Jimmy Carter choosing TRUMP! Cruz blasts media, Trump's Twitter 'tantrums' Top Rand Paul super pac donor endorses Ted Cruz South Carolina Rep. Jeff Duncan endorses Ted Cruz Ted Cruz doubles endorsements from Tennessee lawmakers Cruz Smashes the Ethanol Subsidy How Cruz beat Trump Ted Cruz Wins Voters One-on-One Cruz beats Trump in Iowa CRUZ VIDEOS Courageous Conservatives Reigniting the Promise of America * Copyright 2015 All Rights Reserved | PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT P.O. name: Hillary Clinton
subject: whether or not you watched the GOP debate last night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
No debate about it. | Friend --

The differences between Senator Sanders and me pale in comparison to the differences between our side and Republican candidates, like Ted Cruz and Donald Trump.

They debated last night, and whether or not you watched, I want you to think about what's at risk if one of them wins the White House. They will repeal Obamacare, they will appoint Supreme Court justices that could put marriage equality and voting rights at risk, and they will go after Planned Parenthood. **[But we can stop them. Can you chip in $1 right now?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjQ2NjE2NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxMTQxODQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

I want to protect all the progress President Obama has made, but I won't be able to do that if I can't secure the nomination. And right now, Senator Sanders is outraising us, outspending us, and polling ahead of us in New Hampshire.

**That's why I need you. Can you chip in $1 right now, two days before the New Hampshire primary, and give our campaign the resources we need to get this job done?**
[ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjQ2NjE2NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxMTQxODQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjQ2NjE2NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxMTQxODQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Hillary

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjQ2NjE2NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxMTQxODQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjQ2NjE2NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxMTQxODQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjQ2NjE2NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxMTQxODQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjQ2NjE2NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxMTQxODQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjQ2NjE2NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxMTQxODQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjQ2NjE2NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxMTQxODQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjQ2NjE2NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxMTQxODQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjQ2NjE2NDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxMTQxODQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185

name: Mike Mikus
subject: You'll never believe this
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/1145501012300136448/-9196891398811418624?refcode=e20160207&refcode2=e20160207nd3&amount=3)
---
Friend -- You'll never believe this -- Katie's opponents have recently started attacking Katie's commitment to the environment. _To the environment!_ It's a ridiculous attempt to discredit Katie's record. Katie has been a leader in environmental protection and clean energy for her entire career, and there's no question that she'll keep fighting for those priorities as our senator. [**But we can 't let these attacks go unanswered. We need to push back hard, right now. Can I count on you to pitch in $3 to our Rapid Response Fund so we can correct the record and fight back against these ridiculous attacks?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/1145501012300136448/-9124833804773490688?refcode=e20160207&refcode2=e20160207nd3&amount=3) If our opponents want to open up this discussion, that's certainly fine by us. Let's review just a few of Katie's major achievements as a leader for the environment: \- As an aide to Senator Al Gore, Katie **helped** **strengthen the landmark Clean Air Act** and shape early strategies to take on climate change. \- As Chair of the White House Council on Environmental Quality, Katie drove an agenda that **delivered** **historic gains in renewable energy and ecosystem protection**. \- As Secretary of Pennsylvania's Department of Environmental Protection, Katie **led the charge to attract clean energy companies to Pennsylvania** , resulting in over a billion dollars in new investments and 3,000 new jobs. **There 's simply no debate here: Katie is hands down the best candidate on the environment.** **[We refuse to stand by and allow our opponents to get away with these ridiculous attacks against her. Contribute $3 now so that Katie can fight back and WIN.](https://act.myngp.com/el/1145501012300136448/-9124833804773490688?refcode=e20160207&refcode2=e20160207nd3&amount=3)** Mike Mikus
Campaign Manager
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/1145501012300136448/-9196891398811418624?refcode=e20160207&refcode2=e20160207nd3&amount=3)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/1145501012300136448/9177795080860205056).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: President George H.W. Bush
subject: I am confident
body:
Jeb 2016

Dear Friend,

2. There are just 2 days left until New Hampshire votes.

It does not seem possible, but it has been 28 years since our
team came off a tough showing in Iowa and came back to win New
Hampshire. The momentum it gave our team allowed us to break free
to daylight, and go on to capture the nomination - and the
presidency.

So I know how important New Hampshire is. And from Barbara's
visit there with Jeb, I know you do too. But, I also know Jeb's
team needs to raise $100,000 before Tuesday to have the resources
they need.

I'm hoping I can count on you to help him hit that goal with a
gift of $100, $50, $25 or even $5 right now.

These resources are critical to turn out voters to the polls and
make all the contacts they need to over the next 2 days.

This race is just getting started, and I know Jeb is best
prepared to be Commander-in-Chief on Day One. As more and more
voters make their final decisions, I am confident Jeb can and
will win.

But first, he needs your help to hit his goal of raising $100,000
before New Hampshire votes on Tuesday. Please, rush a gift of
$100, $50, $25 or just $5 to help Jeb.
Barbara and I appreciate everything you've done for Jeb so far,
and we hope he will earn your support Tuesday:
Jeb2016.com/Stand-with-Jeb/

Sincerely,

President George H.W. Bush

Paid for by Jeb 2016,
Inc.

Jeb 2016, Inc.
PO Box 440641
Miami, FL 33144

name: Mary Pat Christie
subject: Chris’ Super Bowl
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
First off, thank you for taking time out before the game to read my email.
I know how this Sunday goes, so I wanted to catch you before the game. Tuesday is a big day, it's the New Hampshire primary.
Last night Chris made a very strong argument for why we need an executive who has had to make consequential decisions and be held accountable for them. And as Governor of New Jersey, Chris has experience making tough decisions. He is absolutely the most prepared person in this race to take on the challenges our country faces as president.
Chris is going to work hard right until the last vote in New Hampshire is cast but, he can't get there without your help.
So today, I am asking you, [**will you please show him that you support him with a donation of $1 or more before the game?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46115934:J9K7kHrNg:m:1:1516426255:0553A77015F2D474C3825D26F2BD59D1:r)
I know he will be very grateful to have your support.
Best,

Mary Pat Christie

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46115935:J9K7kHrNg:m:1:1516426255:0553A77015F2D474C3825D26F2BD59D1:r)

name: Jeb Bush
subject: RE: I am confident
body:
Friend -- the good news is, since my dad emailed this morning, thousands of you have stepped up to answer his call.

**The bad news is with less than 48 hours to go until voting starts, we 're still way short of our goal of $100,000 by Tuesday.**

[**We only have a few hours left to turn this around, so I 'm asking you directly to step up and chip in just $1 right now.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/wwwqkwjmzsgbfhfdbwyqzbthjjbtmhkmqwnwgmhwgwsz_dmdccsjg.html)

The clock is ticking. Help us hit our goal of $100,000 before Tuesday: [**Jeb2016.com/Stand-with-Jeb/**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/ibvkpbcqzdmwgrgywbfkzwtrccwtqrpqkbnbmqrbmbdc_dmdccsjg.html)

Onward,

Jeb

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/zmrjvbfqdlskzczrkbtjdkgcffkgqcvqjbwbsqcbsbwz_dmdccsjg.html)
**-- Begin Forwarded Message--
From: President George H.W. Bush
Date Sent: February 7, 2016
Subject: I am confident**
Dear Friend,

2\. There are just 2 days left until New Hampshire votes.

It does not seem possible, but it has been 28 years since our team came off a tough showing in Iowa and came back to win New Hampshire. The momentum it gave our team allowed us to break free to daylight, and go on to capture the nomination -- and the presidency.

So I know how important New Hampshire is. And from Barbara's visit there with Jeb, I know you do too. **But, I also know Jeb 's team needs to raise $100,000 before Tuesday to have the resources they need.**

[**I 'm hoping I can count on you to help him hit that goal with a gift of $1 right now.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/ihgkpbcqzdmwgrgywbfkzwtrccwtqrpqkbnbmqrbmbny_dmdccsjg.html)

These resources are critical to turn out voters to the polls and make all the contacts they need to over the next 2 days.

This race is just getting started, and I know Jeb is best prepared to be Commander-in-Chief on Day One. As more and more voters make their final decisions, I am confident Jeb can and will win.

[**But first, he needs your help to hit his goal of raising $100,000 before New Hampshire votes on Tuesday. Please, rush a gift of just $1 to help Jeb.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/dtjkzrjwsmcfgbgtfrnksflbjjflwbzwkrdrcwbrcrdp_dmdccsjg.html)

Barbara and I appreciate everything you've done for Jeb so far, and we hope he will earn your support Tuesday: [**Jeb2016.com/Stand-with-Jeb/**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/bpbkvjzmbqgydndpyjtkbysnzzysmnvmkjcjgmnjgjcf_dmdccsjg.html)

Sincerely,

President George H.W. Bush

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/jbqhctnkfmvwspsbwtdhfwzpnnwzkpckhtqtvkptvtqt_dmdccsjg.html)
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144

name: Carly Fiorina
subject: Last night's debate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARLY FOR PRESIDENT
body:
| | | | A disgrace. But not because of what happened on-stage...
---
---
| | | [](http://carlyforpresident.msgfocus.com/c/1TdMsermznBkf0Gk5jBYu2)
---
| | |
## Friend,
## **Last night's debate was an utter disgrace for our party and for our democracy --and it had nothing to do with anything that happened on stage. **
**From the very beginning, the RNC and the mainstream media did all they could to keep us --and _only_ us--off the debate stage** in order to protect their failing establishment picks. But the establishment's despicable actions ramped up significantly more over the past few days: when they started **_intentionally_** doing everything they could to cripple this campaign. **Yesterday, one of the most powerful party bosses at the RNC came after me and this campaign with a below-the-belt hit on social media** --simply because we dared to question the GOP's attempts to rig the game. And on Friday, when my campaign tried to buy ad time during the debate, we were rejected. ABC _so badly_ wanted to ban us from this debate altogether that **they wouldn't even let this campaign pay for a TV commercial.** **Luckily, the political class can only do so much. Voters like you still have the final say.** **And believe me, voters are just as disgusted as we are: the harder the political class tried to shut us down over the last few days, the faster our momentum has grown.** A new poll shows our support _**more than doubling**_ in New Hampshire--now putting us within striking distance of frontrunners Marco Rubio and Ted Cruz. We can continue to grow our momentum and get our message out over the next few days--but getting our message out when we're the media and the GOP's Public Enemy #1 means we're in for our toughest fight yet. It's going to take an all-hands-on-deck effort--and it's going to take every ounce of fight we've got. I'm going to need your support now, more than ever before. [**Can I count you in? Please pitch in $13 so this campaign can beat the political class at their own game --and make sure voters, not elites, get to pick our nominee this spring.**](http://carlyforpresident.msgfocus.com/c/1Te9uV3xdRjIrkewkfOslW) I can't do this without you! **Carly**

---

clean_body: | | | | A disgrace. But not because of what happened on-stage... | | | | | | Friend, Last night's debate was an utter disgrace for our party and for our democracy --and it had nothing to do with anything that happened on stage. From the very beginning, the RNC and the mainstream media did all they could to keep us --and only us--off the debate stage in order to protect their failing establishment picks. But the establishment's despicable actions ramped up significantly more over the past few days: when they started intentionally doing everything they could to cripple this campaign. Yesterday, one of the most powerful party bosses at the RNC came after me and this campaign with a below-the-belt hit on social media --simply because we dared to question the GOP's attempts to rig the game. And on Friday, when my campaign tried to buy ad time during the debate, we were rejected. ABC so badly wanted to ban us from this debate altogether that they wouldn't even let this campaign pay for a TV commercial. Luckily, the political class can only do so much. Voters like you still have the final say. And believe me, voters are just as disgusted as we are: the harder the political class tried to shut us down over the last few days, the faster our momentum has grown. A new poll shows our support more than doubling in New Hampshire--now putting us within striking distance of frontrunners Marco Rubio and Ted Cruz. We can continue to grow our momentum and get our message out over the next few days--but getting our message out when we're the media and the GOP's Public Enemy #1 means we're in for our toughest fight yet. It's going to take an all-hands-on-deck effort--and it's going to take every ounce of fight we've got. I'm going to need your support now, more than ever before. I can't do this without you! Carly | "DONATE NOW" | | | PAID FOR BY CARLY FOR PRESIDENT

name: James Carville
subject: I hear there's a game today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
It's Hillary versus the whackadoodles on the other side | Friend --

What a weekend. My boy Peyton is playing in his fourth championship game, the world has descended on New Orleans for Mardi Gras, and last night the WWE sponsored the 2016 Insult-fest Rumble in New Hampshire.

I'm only sort of kidding about that last one -- for those who indulged, the GOP candidates took the debate stage again, and again, we heard their dangerous and bananas plans for our country.

Do they think this is the 1950's?! On what planet can you alienate women, Muslims, people of color, and gay people and still get the privilege of representing us on the world stage? Let's send 'em a message. **[Chip in $1 to help Hillary prevent them from representing us.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjQ2NjQxNzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxMjIwMTI2S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Mark my words: The only person standing between the whackadoodles on the other side and the White House is my friend Hillary. She has years of practice standing up to Republicans and winning. No matter how many insults and baseless allegations they throw at her, she comes out stronger, she finds common ground, and she just gets things done.

But she's got to be our nominee first to get there, and our side of the race is tight. While I like Bernie enough, we don't need a revolution. We need a productive conversation, and Hillary's the only person who can get us there.

Bernie's team has stepped up for him, and while I know there are more people on this team than Bernie's, fundraising numbers are telling a very different story. Make sure the world knows we're with her and you're willing to do whatever it takes to help her protect the White House. **Chip in $1 right now and close that Texas-sized gap:**
[ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjQ2NjQxNzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxMjIwMTI2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjQ2NjQxNzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxMjIwMTI2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Carville

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjQ2NjQxNzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxMjIwMTI2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjQ2NjQxNzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxMjIwMTI2S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjQ2NjQxNzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxMjIwMTI2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjQ2NjQxNzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxMjIwMTI2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjQ2NjQxNzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxMjIwMTI2S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjQ2NjQxNzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxMjIwMTI2S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjQ2NjQxNzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxMjIwMTI2S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjQ2NjQxNzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxMjIwMTI2S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjQ2NjQxNzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxMjIwMTI2S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjQ2NjQxNzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQxMjIwMTI2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
